title: Amtech S0647 250mm (10") Mini bungee cords (10 pack)
features: UP TO 50% EXTENSION: This pack of ten 250mm (10"), 5mm diameter mini bungee cords can extend up to 50%
STRONG METAL HOOKS: The cords have strong steel hooks and are ideal for lightweight binding applications
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 10x Bungee See more
